You may or may not have heard of dig.com. It's a very popular site. It gets very high rankings in the search engines when you use it properly. Creating an account is free, just like all the other account sites that I've shown you. I'm already logged in with mine. It just default logs me in. It just recognizes my computer and automatically logs me in. I'm going to show you what to do once you're logged in. Creating a free account is as easy as all the other sites that I've shown you how to do, where you just create your username, your email address, and your password. You enter it, and then you might have to confirm it by going to your email box and clicking a link. But very easy to do. So now we're going to go to submit new up here at the top. We'll click on that. First thing it's going to want is your link. So let's say we're doing your squido. And we're going to do www.squido.com. Forward slash face lifter x3000. Alright, it's going to be a news article and continue. It might tell me there's no such thing. Okay, it didn't recognize it. I was worried that it was going to say there's no such thing since we didn't actually create that page. But it let me go ahead anyways. Next thing we're going to put our title, and this is going to be like all the others, where it's just going to have our keyword. And then our description will be something like, Wow face lifter x3000. My grandmother. Beautiful again. Sorry, Grammy, if you ever watched this. This was a joke. So wow, face lifter x3000 made my grandmother beautiful again. It's just a quick description, making sure that you have the keyword in the description. We don't need a thumbnail. You can leave it to the default if you want. Let's see if we need to choose a topic. This is on health. See lifestyle health. Alright, we'll choose health. It shows us a preview here. Ask us if we're human. We'll type in the things here and prove that we're human. And then we'll go ahead and hit submit story. I'm not going to hit submit story because then it would be a fake listing. And I don't want to do a fake listing. That could get these people married mad at me and ban my account. I don't want that to happen. So that's as easy as it is to, I'm going to the same steps on mix, the same steps on propeller and shout why are you going to do the same exact things. Point them all to, you know, point two of them to your squiddo, one of them to your hub page and another one to your Weebly or Mix and Match or do all four to all three. However you want, you know, you just start linking them all together and that's going to build up your your presence to the search engines. The search engines are going to see that you're going out there and using all of its favorite sites and all of its favorite sites are talking about your website and using this one main keyword all the time. And so it's going to say, wow, you know, all my favorite sites are using this one keyword. They're all talking about it. It must be special. Let's start raising everything to the top of the search engines. That's how it works. It's a beautiful thing.
